name: nanookai-skills
description: Central catalog of NanookAI agent skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: frankfurter-api
plugins.description: Teaches AI agents to fetch exchange rates and convert currencies with the free Frankfurter API (no API key required)

plugins.name: open-meteo-api
plugins.description: Teaches AI agents to fetch weather forecasts, current conditions, historical weather, and air quality with the free Open-Meteo API (no API key required)

plugins.name: countries-api
plugins.description: Teaches AI agents to query country data, city/place search, postal codes, IP geolocation, and distances with the free countries.dev API (no API key required)

plugins.name: binance-api
plugins.description: Teaches AI agents to fetch live and historical crypto market data (prices, klines, order books, trades, futures funding rates, open interest) with the free Binance public REST API (no API key required)

plugins.name: worldbank-api
plugins.description: Teaches AI agents to fetch GDP, population, inflation, and ~30,000 other development indicators for every economy with the free World Bank Indicators API (no API key required)
